title: Compressed Coal
description: Adds compressed coal for save space.
body:
**The mod adds compressed coals. They are created by arranging specific coals in a 9x9 pattern in the crafting table.**

_This mod is finished and will not receive content updates, but there will be version updates._

## Coals:
- Coal x81
  - Burn time: 129 600 ticks (648 items)
  - Crafting: 9x Block of Coal
  - Icon:

   ![Coal x81](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/380f3b8abf59d80f8a672f4deb6e9b59f6d33c13_0.webp)
- Coal x729
  - Burn time: 1 166 400 ticks (5 832 items)
  - Crafting: 9x Coal x81
  - Icon:

   ![Coal x729](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/262ccbe008c25c34df2cfdc49f2d5f20bfd6ee1f_0.webp)
- Coal x6561
  - Burn time: 10 497 600 ticks (52 488 items)
  - Crafting: 9x Coal x729
  - Icon:

   ![Coal x6561](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e45f2f553e8863cea6d6efdbcc55c8f4a1736999_0.webp)
- Coal x59049
  - Burn time: 94 478 400 ticks (472 392 items)
  - Crafting: 9x Coal x6561
  - Icon:

   ![Coal x59049](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db00d33cd2fdda34208b60d9a97ba81cdb78f39c_0.webp)
- Coal x531441
  - Burn time: 850 305 600 ticks (4 251 528 items)
  - Crafting: 9x Coal x59049
  - Icon:

   ![Coal x531441](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4f10048b4f4c05f8e7ce1e0a3c8b2d2a0de43f8_0.webp)
